description: Implement heap sort algorithm package with core sorting functions
steps: Create heapify function to maintain max-heap property
Implement buildMaxHeap function to transform unsorted array into max-heap
Implement HeapSort function that sorts elements in ascending order
Add support for generic types using Go generics (any comparable type)

description: Add utility functions for heap operations
steps: Implement heap push operation for adding elements
Implement heap pop operation for removing max element
Add heap size and empty check functions

description: Add comprehensive unit tests for heap sort implementation
steps: Test sorting of single element slice
Test sorting of already sorted slice (best case)
Test sorting of reverse sorted slice (worst case)
Test sorting of slice with duplicate elements
Test sorting of large random slices

description: Add CLI interface for heap sort demonstration
steps: Accept comma-separated integers from command line
Add timing information for performance reference
